Home › Newtown Square, PA

Lifestyle Medicine Near Newtown Square, PA

About Newtown Square, PA

Newtown Square’s professional community — many working in tech, consulting, and corporate environments nearby — faces the familiar tension between demanding careers and long-term health. Metabolic risk, stress, and sedentary work patterns are the background conditions for many residents. Forward Family Medicine’s lifestyle medicine-integrated approach addresses these patterns directly, 7–8 miles north in Wayne.

Prevention-Centered Care, Close to Newtown Square

Forward Family Medicine integrates lifestyle medicine into every DPC membership. Evidence-based nutrition, activity, sleep, and stress counseling are included as clinical standards — not add-ons or referrals to separate programs.

Dr. Lieberman is dual board-certified in Family Medicine and Lifestyle Medicine — the only such physician at any DPC practice on the Main Line.

What is lifestyle medicine? →

Why Newtown Square Patients Choose This Approach

  • Lifestyle medicine included in membership at no extra cost
  • Personalized nutrition and activity guidance
  • Chronic disease management with lifestyle at the center
  • Stress and sleep addressed alongside physical health
  • Telehealth for routine lifestyle check-ins and follow-ups

Services Included

Lifestyle medicine · Preventive care · Chronic disease management · Unlimited visits Full services →

Practical Information

Distance: ~7–8 miles north via Route 252 or Route 3 to Route 252 Drive time: ~18–22 minutes SEPTA: No direct rail — telehealth recommended for lifestyle consultations Telehealth: Video and phone consultations included

Frequently Asked Questions

Is lifestyle medicine available near Newtown Square, PA? Yes — Forward Family Medicine in Wayne includes lifestyle medicine in every membership, 7–8 miles from Newtown Square.

Is lifestyle medicine covered in the membership fee? Yes — completely included. See membership →

Can Newtown Square patients do lifestyle consultations by video? Yes — telehealth is included and recommended for routine lifestyle coaching, follow-ups, and check-ins.

Contact & Practice Information

Address: 295 Old Eagle School Road, Wayne, PA 19087 Phone: (215) 645-7044 Fax: (215) 449-8854 Email: Information@forwardfamilymedicine.com Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Forward Family Medicine is a Direct Primary Care practice. Membership is not insurance. We recommend pairing DPC with a high-deductible or health-sharing plan.
